execution_explanation: The balance itself - not perfect. But everything else around it, the landing, just looks so in control
great speed, full obstacle, stylish reverse landing to signal control

Great execution, great speed. No complaints.
Full box. Knees should be lower and this is a bit unbalanced, but looks great overall
great speed, great execution. pose maybe could be lower, but it doesn't look unnatural as is

body position not low enough, but otherwise clean
